---
title: "Publications & Writing"
---

## Research Work

### Google Scholar Profile

[View my Google Scholar profile →](https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=2NmGuDsAAAAJ)

My research focuses on:
- Machine Learning Optimization
- Model Efficiency and Compression
- Open Source ML Infrastructure
- Community-Driven AI/ML Development

---

## Coming Soon

I'm actively working on research papers and technical writing. Check back soon for:

- 📄 **Research Papers** - Peer-reviewed publications
- 📝 **Blog Posts** - Technical deep dives and tutorials
- 📚 **Technical Articles** - Guides and how-tos

---

## Community Contributions

Beyond formal publications, I contribute to the broader ML community through:

- **Jupyter Notebooks** - Interactive examples and tutorials
- **Documentation** - Clear explanations of complex ML concepts
- **Open Source PRs** - Code that improves the ecosystem
- **Model Deployments** - Accessible implementations on HuggingFace and Docker

[Explore my open source work →](projects.qmd)
